# The Portal HQ

> The Portal HQ is a transformable 5,000 sq ft Raleigh premier event venue on Hillsborough Street, optimized for corporate retreats, private celebrations, concerts, showcases, and receptions.

## Fast facts
- Venue name: The Portal HQ
- Location: Hillsborough Street, Raleigh, NC
- Space: 5,000 square feet
- Capacity: Optimized for corporate events, concerts, private parties, and showcases.
- Primary features: Production-grade AV, custom stage lighting, 360° virtual tour, custom catering proposals, and full-service event support.
- Website: https://theportalhq.com

## Public pages
- Home / Request Proposal: https://theportalhq.com/
- Corporate Retreats: https://theportalhq.com/corporate
- Concerts & Showcases: https://theportalhq.com/concerts
- Private Celebrations: https://theportalhq.com/celebrations
- Virtual Tour / HQ Details: https://theportalhq.com/portal-hq
- Sip & Sync Social Hour: https://theportalhq.com/sip-and-sync
